name: read_file
description: Read file contents from the workspace

name: write_file
description: Write or overwrite a file in the workspace

name: apply_patch
description: Apply a structured patch to workspace files

name: git
description: Run non-modifying git commands (status, log, diff, show)

name: fetch_url_context
description: Fetch page content and extract textual context from a URL

name: fetch_pdf_context
description: Fetch and extract text context from PDF resources

name: extract_links_context
description: Extract and summarize links from a web page

name: search_web_context
description: Search the web and return contextual snippets

name: search_arxiv_papers
description: Search arXiv papers and return relevant metadata/context

name: score_sources
description: Score and rank gathered context sources

name: list_workspace_files
description: List files in the configured workspace

name: get_workspace_file_context
description: Get contextual snippet(s) for a workspace file

name: list_uploaded_context_files
description: List uploaded context files available to the session

name: get_uploaded_context_file
description: Read a specific uploaded context file

name: retrieve_conversation_summary
description: Retrieve condensed summary for prior conversation state

name: execute_command
description: Run a command in the workspace and capture stdout/stderr
